lsp.justification: The answer explicitly identifies the expected 96 function-pointer assignments and also accounts for the two non-function fields, matching the GT summary that nl80211 fills 96 of 136 function-pointer fields. It appears to continue through the end of the struct literal rather than stopping early, including late fields such as br_* / add_tx_ts / del_tx_ts / do_acs / set_band / get_pref_freq_list / set_prob_oper_freq.
